<table class="navbox">
<tr><th colspan="2" class="navbox-title">Willverse — books by series</th></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Traveler's Gate</th><td class="navbox-data">[[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]] • [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]] • [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Elder Empire</th><td class="navbox-data">[[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]] • [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]] • [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]] • [[Of Darkness and Dawn (novel)|Of Darkness and Dawn]] • [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]] • [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">Cradle</th><td class="navbox-data">[[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]] • [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]] • [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]] • [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]] • [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]] • [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]] • [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]] • [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]] • [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]] • [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]] • [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]] • [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]] • [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]</td></tr>
<tr><th class="navbox-label">The Last Horizon</th><td class="navbox-data">[[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]] • [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]] • [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]] • [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]</td></tr>
</table>
